title: Sprite Pipeline Source Asset Descriptor
description: Describes a Blender (or other) source asset so the source linter can validate it before export. Body-only this iteration; the schema permits weapon/shield/gear regions and arbitrary socket names for forward-compatibility, but policy (which are allowed now) is enforced by the linter.

archetype.description: Engine archetype the bake targets (biped/bird/quadruped/ball/...). Optional in the schema for back-compat with internal descriptors; REQUIRED for a delivered generated package (the intake gate enforces it + checks it against the external_asset archetype enum, the authoritative list).

rig.description: Rig profile name the animation clips target (e.g. quadruped_v1). Optional here for back-compat; REQUIRED for a delivered package and the intake gate verifies a matching rig_profiles/<rig>.json (or schema_extensions/<rig>.rig_profile.json) exists.

default_state.description: Animation state shown at rest. Optional; synthesis defaults to 'idle' if present else the first clip.

default_fps.description: Fallback playback fps for any clip that does not declare its own fps.

fps.description: Playback fps for this clip. Falls back to default_fps, then the pipeline default.
